hub_subtitle: Business English for HR leadership in international meetings

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Murielle? — Your Professional Self-Introduction
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself to an international HR counterpart -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic & Professional Self-Introduction
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Murielle Xavier | Aula 1 -- Who Is Murielle?

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our global HR alignment call. I'm James, the People Director here in Australia. We've prepared a short agenda for today. First, we'll review the headcount and the latest turnover figures. Then we'll look at the new hiring plan for the local team. We have partners joining from Brazil, Chile, and the Middle East, so please introduce yourself before you speak, and tell us how long you have been with the company. If you've already sent your reports, thank you — we've received them. Let's make this a productive session.

Hi Murielle, it's Sarah from the corporate team. I'm calling about the people review next week. It has been moved to Thursday at two o'clock, and the call will be in English, since our Australian colleagues have joined the project. Could you bring your turnover numbers and a short update on your team? I've already shared the agenda by email, so please take a look when you have a moment. It's a quick meeting, about thirty minutes. Let me know if that time works for you. Thanks, and talk soon.
